styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cream bg #faf9f5, terracotta accent #d97757, warm near-black text #1b1b19, solid surfaces (no glassmorphism, no gradients)
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: serif: Newsreader/Lora/Georgia; sans: Poppins/system-ui; mono: Geist Mono/JetBrains Mono
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceDepthModel: static surfaces use thin border + subtle shadow (alpha <= 0.05); only floating layers (modals, toasts) use deeper elevation
styleContinuityAnchors.motionSystem: state transitions 0.15-0.3s ease-out-quart; only transform & opacity animated; no spring/overshoot; no breathing loops

pages.title: 首页
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean editorial home page with today's reading card, progress ring, streak badge, and achievement wall. Warm cream background, solid surfaces, no glassmorphism or gradients.

pages.title: 阅读页
pages.visualNorthStar: Split-screen reading interface: left sidebar with language/difficulty controls and reading history, right panel with interactive passage text. Solid surfaces, clean borders.

pages.title: 设置
pages.visualNorthStar: Settings modal overlay on dimmed background. Solid panel with API provider selection, model input, theme toggle. No backdrop blur.
